description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features a robust, armored exterior with a teal and bronze color scheme, giving it a futuristic and tactical appearance. The body is low-slung with angular, reinforced panels and a prominent, turret-mounted weapon system on the roof, suggesting a military or security application. Large, rugged wheels with thick tires and visible suspension components indicate its capability to traverse rough urban and off-road environments. The front and rear are equipped with protective bumpers and reinforced grilles, while the sides display geometric markings and access panels. The windows are small and reinforced, providing limited but secure visibility for occupants. The overall design emphasizes durability, protection, and high mobility in challenging urban scenarios.
description: A heavily armored, teal and bronze all-terrain vehicle with a roof-mounted turret, rugged wheels, and reinforced panels for urban and off-road use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular armored panels, large wheels, and the full profile of the roof-mounted turret.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the reinforced bumper, protective grille, and the central placement of the turret above the windshield.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the vehicle's geometric markings, access panels, and the rear-mounted equipment.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the back bumper, rear grille, and the 'DANGER' warning label, with the turret visible on top.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a blocky, all-terrain tread pattern with deep grooves, designed for optimal traction on both urban surfaces and rough terrain.
